docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY CORPUZ, JOSE AS TO DEFENDANT BONIFACIO, EILEEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-04-2013 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF CORPUZ, JOSE
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE JEAN MILEFF FILED BY CORPUZ, JOSE BONIFACIO, EILEEN

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CORPUZ, JOSE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BONIFACIO, EILEEN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

TRIAL RESET TO NOV-06-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF OCT-04-2013 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-27-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-27-2013 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES UNTIMELY SERVICE. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-27-2013 - JUDGMENT.
